LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR GENERAL NEGLIGENCE CANNOT STAND ON THESE FACTS AND SHOULD BE SUBSUMED WITHIN THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MEDICAL MALPRACTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT- THE MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED. IF PLAINTIFF WISHES TO ALLEGE A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, HE SHALL FOLLOW THE PROCEDURE SET FORTH IN CAL. CIV. PRO. 425.13. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFFS CANNOT RECOVER GENERAL DAMAGES OR LOSS OF EARNINGS DAMAGES. TURPIN V. SORTINI (1982) 31 CAL.3D 220, 237; ANDALON V. SUP. CRT. (1984) 162 CAL.APP.3D 600, 614. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO HIGHLIGHT A BASIS FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. THE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS IMPROPER BECAUSE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 425.13. THE COURT READ AND CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION, WHICH WAS FILED ON APRIL 22, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

THE COURT STRIKES THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION; PAGE 12, LINE 1 ("GENERAL DAMAGES ACCORDING TO PROOF"); PAGE 12, LINE 3 ("DAMAGES OF LOSS OF EARNING ACCORDING TO PROOF"); PAGE 12, LINE 8 ('REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES ACCORDING TO PROOF"); AND PAGE 12, LINE 9 ("PUNITIVE DAMAGES ACCORDING TO PROOF"). LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS TARA GANANCE AND JUSTIN DAVIS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES FOR PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE & MEDICAL MALPRACTICE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE GENERAL DAMAGES IN PARAGRAPHS 30 AND 31 OF THE PROPOSED SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IN CONTRAVENTION OF THE COURT'S PRIOR RULINGS. THE COURT RULED ON MAY 1, 2013 IN TWO SEPARATE ORDERS GRANTING MOTIONS TO STRIKE THAT PLAINTIFFS CANNOT RECOVER GENERAL DAMGES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT MAINTAINED ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION BY DEMONSTRATING THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT BREACH THE STANDARD OF CASE. (DECLARATION OF DR. ROY FILLY). IN OPPOSITION, THE DECLARATION OF DR. SUSAN GOOTNICK CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED THE APPROPRIATE STANDARD OF CARE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MANSFIELD, M.D., STUART H.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-19-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant maintained its initial burden of production by demonstrating that defendant did not breach the standard of case. (Declaration of Dr. Roy Filly). In opposition, the declaration of Dr. Susan Gootnick creates a triable issue of material fact regarding whether defendant breached the appropriate standard of care. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Damages For Professional Negligence & Medical Malpractice
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - AATY. ANDREW CANTUR, TEL. NO. 817-1708 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MARCELL PATRICK NERI OF HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP, TEL. NO. 288-9800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SUTTER;
ATTY. BRET R. LANDESS OF OUIM REYEN & PRYOR, TEL. NO. 392-8300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS TARA GANANCE AND JUSTIN DAVIS' Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint For Damages For Professional Negligence & Medical Malpractice is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs allege general damages in paragraphs 30 and 31 of the proposed Second Amended Complaint in contravention of the Court's prior rulings. The Court ruled on May 1, 2013 in two separate orders granting motions to strike that Plaintiffs cannot recover general damges. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: J. JULIA HANSEN, ESQ., 415.288.9800, FOR DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS DBA CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court strikes the First Cause of Action; page 12, line 1 ("general damages according to proof"); page 12, line 3 ("damages of loss of earning according to proof"); page 12, line 8 ('reasonable attorney fees according to proof"); and page 12, line 9 ("punitive damages according to proof"). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BERT R. LANDESS, ESQ., 415.392.8300, FOR DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STUART MANSFIELD, M.D.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted without leave to amend in its entirety. Plaintiffs cannot recover general damages or loss of earnings damages. Turpin v. Sortini (1982) 31 Cal.3d 220, 237; Andalon v. Sup. Crt. (1984) 162 Cal.App.3d 600, 614. Plaintiff fails to highlight a basis for attorney's fees. The prayer for attorney's fees is improper because plaintiff failed to comply with CCP 425.13. The Court read and considered Plaintiff's Opposition to this motion, which was filed on April 22, 2013. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
